scope: Pure-analytic CPU-only synthesis of #136/#154/#161. No HF Job / submission / served-file change. BASELINE stays 481.53. Adds 0 TPS.

band.interpretation: roofline<->overlap substitutes; ONE step quoted (overlap), the spread is the residual step-anchor uncertainty (matches fern #155's 0.5% half-width).
